steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content:
Expand and combine like terms.
$${5}(2x+9)-3(2x-4)=10x+45-6x+12=4x+57$$
Set this equal to the right side.
$$4x+57=-3+14x$$
$$60=10x$$
$$x=6$$

steps.title: Compute the requested value
steps.content:
The question asks for $12x$, not just $x$.
$$12x=12(6)=72$$
The answer is D.
